channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Palarong Pambansa 2026 concludes with closing ceremony in Agusan del Sur and turnover to Quezon City
item.description: The 66th Palarong Pambansa officially concluded on Sunday, May 31, 2026, with its closing ceremony held at the Datu Lipus Makapandong Cultural Center in Prosperidad, Agusan del Sur. The event gathered...

item.title: Supporters Protest Alleged Irregularities in APGA Oyi Constituency Primary Election in Anambra
item.description: There was tension on Friday at the Anambra State Government House in Awka when a large group of protesters from Oyi Local Government Area stormed the premises to challenge the outcome of the All Progr...

item.title: Nationals Overcome Padres with Late-Game Surge in 9-4 Victory
item.description: The Washington Nationals secured a 9-4 victory over the San Diego Padres on Saturday, thanks to a decisive sixth-run seventh inning. For the first six innings, Nationals batters carefully faced Padres...

item.title: From instability to structure: How Bafana Bafana evolved from 2002 turmoil to 2026 promise
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s journey to the 2026 FIFA World Cup stands in sharp contrast to the instability that defined their 2002 campaign. In the early 2000s, South Africa’s national team faced significant orga...

item.title: Canberra Raiders defeat Cowboys in milestone match but suffer injury concerns
item.description: The Canberra Raiders secured an important 26-12 victory over the North Queensland Cowboys in a match that strengthened their push for a top-eight finish in the NRL, but the result may have been oversh...

item.title: The Killers headline UEFA Champions League 2026 opening ceremony in Budapest
item.description: The Killers performed live at the 2026 UEFA Champions League Final opening ceremony at Budapest’s Puskás Aréna on 30th May. The band, led by Brandon Flowers, delivered a set of their classic hits incl...

item.title: Arsenal lose Champions League final to PSG on penalties as Declan Rice reflects on ‘cruel’ defeat
item.description: Arsenal were left heartbroken after Paris Saint-Germain secured back-to-back Champions League titles with a narrow penalty shootout victory following a tense final in Budapest. After a tightly contest...

item.title: Police recover 22 stolen phones in Nairobi CBD following social media tip-off
item.description: Police in Nairobi have successfully dismantled a suspected mobile phone theft network following a breakthrough that originated from a social media advertisement. According to the National Police Servi...

item.title: List of Africa’s largest churches by weekly attendance and key figures
item.description: The article explores the largest churches in Africa based on their average weekly attendance, highlighting the rapid growth of mega churches across the continent. It explains how increasing population...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal Warrant Officer arrested over alleged assistance in suspect escape
item.description: A police warrant officer in KwaZulu-Natal has been arrested for allegedly aiding three suspects in escaping from the holding cells at KwaMsane police station. The incident occurred on 27 February 2024...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange Week 22 2026: Trading volume drops 63% while SWIS leads gains and foreign investors remain net sellers
item.description: The Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) closed Week 22 of 2026 with a sharp decline in market activity, as equity turnover excluding ETFs dropped by 63.13% week-on-week to TZS 13.70 billion. Trading vo...

item.title: Kwankwaso Reacts to His Selection as Peter Obi’s Running Mate for 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Kano State Governor, Rabiu Kwankwaso, has expressed appreciation after being selected as the Vice Presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) for the 2027 general elections....

item.title: Patricia Mae Santor Wins Seven Golds, Becomes Most Decorated Athlete at 2026 Palarong Pambansa
item.description: At the 2026 Palarong Pambansa held in Agusan del Sur, National Capital Region swimmer Patricia Mae Santor emerged as the most decorated athlete of the event. The UST High School standout achieved a re...

item.title: Former Earth Sciences Secretary M Ravichandran to join IIT Madras as faculty after retirement
item.description: M Ravichandran, who recently retired as the Secretary of the Ministry of Earth Sciences, is set to return to academia by joining the Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT-M) as a faculty member. ...

item.title: U.S. Energy Department Considers Using Surplus Plutonium as Fuel for Civilian Nuclear Reactors
item.description: The U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) is considering a program to make surplus plutonium available for use in nuclear fuel, marking a significant shift from its traditional role in weapons production. U...

item.title: Sonko Calls for Safety Accountability After Deadly Utumishi Girls Dormitory Fire
item.description: Former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko visited students injured in the Utumishi Girls dormitory fire who are currently receiving treatment at Kenyatta National Hospital. The tragic incident led to the dea...

item.title: Panic Erupts as Fire Breaks Out at Cafeteria Inside Magunas Shell Petrol Station in Makuyu
item.description: A fire broke out at the cafeteria inside Magunas Shell Petrol Station in Makuyu, Murang’a County, triggering panic among staff and customers. Detective Jane Mugoh and her team managed to extinguish th...

item.title: Yogi Adityanath launches Hindi edition of emergency medical awareness handbook in Lucknow
item.description: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath has launched the Hindi edition of a public health awareness book titled 'The Red Book of Emergency – Life Saving Tips' in Lucknow. The book is designed to ...

item.title: Rising smoking rates and unregulated vaping among South African youth highlight gaps in tobacco control
item.description: South Africa is facing a worsening public health challenge as both traditional smoking and vaping trends move in the wrong direction. While global tobacco use has declined significantly over the past ...

item.title: Analysis of small modular reactors and the growing gap between nuclear power and renewable energy expansion
item.description: The article discusses arguments from energy analyst Michael Liebreich, who challenges the idea that nuclear power—particularly small modular reactors (SMRs)—can realistically compete with rapidly expa...
